accepted_sources.title: IRS releases tax inflation adjustments for tax year 2026, including amendments from the One, Big, Beautiful Bill
accepted_sources.locator: Paragraph: 'Estates of decedents who die during 2026 have a basic exclusion amount of $15,000,000, up from a total of $13,990,000 for estates of decedents who died in 2025.'

accepted_sources.title: What's new — Estate and gift tax
accepted_sources.locator: Section text: 'OBBB amends § 2010(c)(3) by increasing the basic exclusion amount to $15,000,000 for calendar year 2026'

accepted_sources.title: Revenue Procedure 2025-32
accepted_sources.locator: SECTION 2, paragraph .14, page 7: OBBBA amended IRC section 2010(c)(3) to increase the basic exclusion amount to $15,000,000 for calendar year 2026
